Recipe: Vegan Chickpea & Spinach Frittata
Ingredient List: (1) 1 can chick peas (drained), (½) medium spinach leaves, (¼) onion, minced garlic, salt, pepper, olive oil, breadcrumbs, egg substitute, nutritional yeast (optional).
Prep time: Minutes. Cook time (including baking): 20 minutes. Total time including prep and cooking: About 30-40 mins. 🍳
Step ⭐️1: Preheat your oven to 425°F/221°C. Line a muffin tin with cupcake liners or grease them well. Set aside. Step ⅓️2: In a large skillet over medium heat, sauté the onions until translucent. Add the garlicky spinaches, stirring occasionally, until wilted. Season with salt and peppers. Remove from heat and set aside to cool. Steps ¾️3-7: To assemble the frittatas, scoop out about ½ cup of mixture into each lined cup in the mold. Sprinkle bread crumb topping evenly over the top of each frittatta. Bake for 8-1

Mexican Grilled Corn and Black Bean Salad

[Heading]: Mexican Grilling Corn & Black bean Salads
Ready in under 90mins, this simple yet tasty recipie features freshly grillled corn, seasoned black bean hummus, mixed greens, cherry tomatoes, avacado, jicama, radishes, shredded carrots, sprouts and a tangy homemade dresser made from fresh cucumbers, limes, honey, garam masala, ginger and salt. This healthy and refreshing salads will give you a boost of energy and keep you full throughout the day. Enjoy!
